title: Popcub Pack
description: Created for the Nono's Carnival community server. Inspired by Fernsfield Farming by snifferish with additions and tweaks
body:
Building exciting and fun times for the Nono's Carnival community. Focusing on positivity and making sure everyone is having a great and cozy time.

Current mod focus is expanded cooking, farming, building and creating a foundation for both solo and group play.
